【天灾／囤货／系统/空间】
白毛女主男女通杀，最强辅助弟弟+1猫1狗。
八月大雪，龙卷风，大冰雹，血色沙尘暴，臭氧层破洞……只是开始？
弟弟白缈从小就有做梦预见灾难成真的能力。
预言十五天后，末日降临！
人类禁受重重天灾，彻底走向毁灭！
白夭雪拿到父亲遗留的戒指，获得一个鸟巢大的空间，还可以升级？带领弟弟疯狂囤货……
获得全防御系统，越打越强！
【疼痛耐度：+100】
【耐光性：+100】
【耐热性：+100】
【耐毒性：+100】
【免疫力：+100】
……
天灾重重，丧尸来临，人类为对抗灾难兽人化，异能者产生……
四大阵营对立，究竟谁能真正主宰废土命运？
ps：男主可有可无。
后面看腹黑和忠犬谁更胜一筹。
如果有，大概率是表面单纯黏人奶狗，内里疯批阴险狠毒的病娇影帝沈梓霖……
ps2：本文不是单一的感情线，含多个修罗场。
末世女性成稀缺资源，很多男性会争抢一个。
ps3：大女主，主要走剧情，尘埃市本来男多女少，后面更多为了种族延续。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/1957c7f60b883aa5981783035b9aebca~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"兔肉包子呐","author_id":"","book_id":"7120995560575732748","book_name":"末世灾变：开局囤货引来病娇恶霸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#603010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7121338392562008580","read_count":"12","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"152980"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.6","serial_count":"73","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,系统,幻想言情,末世,团宠,病娇","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1957c7f60b883aa5981783035b9aebca~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430733&x-signature=Lne9iu5OPJEIgdLeUZGRp%2Bs5THY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"94137405365","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.649922e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323141853204807557D9A70BB
